text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 112 

MDCR_TOTAL_FFS_USE 

LABEL: Medicare Use (FFS Claim Count) — Total 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total count of claims for all Medicare fee-for-service (FFS) claims and Part D events 
(PDEs) for the beneficiary during the year. Note that only fee-for-service (FFS) claims for services and 
PDEs are included. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: Medicare Claims files (derived) 

VALUES: XX 

COMMENT: CCW calculates
